chunks.text: Course: EE 299 | EECS at UC Berkeley EE 299. Individual Research Catalog Description: Investigation of problems in electrical engineering. Units: 1-12 Also Offered As: ELENG 299 Formats: Spring: 1-12 hours of independent study per week Summer: 1.5-22.5 hours of independent study per week Summer: 2.5-30 hours of independent study per week Fall: 1-12 hours of independent study per week Final Exam Status: No Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required) CS enrollment policies EE enrollment policies HKN course maps
